tagline: Your One-Stop Shop for All Swimming Pool Needs Since 1991

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Our Family's 35-Year
Promise
hero.subheadline: From installation to weekly care, Pool 'n Play has been Southeastern Massachusetts' one-stop pool shop since 1991. One family, one phone call, every pool need handled — so you can stop worrying and start swimming.
checkmarks: BBB A+ rated since day one
One-stop shop for every pool need

services.label: What We Do
services.headline: Every Pool Need, One <br class="hidden md:block">Trusted Family Team
services.subtitle: Whether you need a brand-new pool, a liner replacement, or just the right chemicals — Pool 'n Play handles it all under one roof so you never have to call around.

cards.title: Inground Pool Installation
cards.description: Custom-designed inground pools built for your backyard and your life. From permits to the final fill, our crew handles every detail with 35 years of know-how.

cards.title: Above Ground Pools
cards.description: Quality above-ground pool installations at an affordable price. Professional setup, proper leveling, and expert advice to get your family swimming fast.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, liners, structural issues — we diagnose it right and fix it fast. Most repairs handled in a single visit by our experienced technicians.

cards.title: Seasonal Opening & Closing
cards.description: Protect your investment through harsh New England winters and get swim-ready each spring. Thorough, by-the-book service every season for over three decades.

cards.title: Pool Liner Replacement
cards.description: Worn, faded, or leaking liner? We remove and replace it with precision, restoring your pool's look and watertight integrity in just a few days.

cards.title: Equipment & Supply Shop
cards.description: Full retail store stocked with chemicals, parts, pumps, filters, toys, and accessories from trusted brands. Stop in or call — we always have what you need.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Call or Visit Our Shop
steps.description: Tell us about your pool — or your dream of one. Stop by 32 South Main Street in Berkley or give us a call. We'll listen, assess, and give you an honest quote with zero pressure.

steps.title: We Handle the Details
steps.description: From permits and scheduling to parts and labor, our experienced team takes care of everything. You get one point of contact and clear communication every step of the way.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: Your pool is installed, repaired, or opened — and it's ready to enjoy. Plus, our shop and service team are always here when you need supplies, advice, or a helping hand.

about.label: Why Pool Owners Choose Us
about.headline: Not a Franchise. Not a Side Hustle. We're Your Neighborhood Pool Family.
about.description: Pool 'n Play has been a family-owned fixture in Southeastern Massachusetts since 1991. Led by President Christopher Lindberg, our team brings personal, hands-on expertise to every job — from new pool installations to quick equipment repairs. With a BBB A+ rating, a fully stocked retail store, and 35 years of local trust, we treat your pool like it's in our own backyard. That's not a slogan — it's how we've done business for three decades.

features.title: One-Stop Pool Shop
features.description: Installation, service, repairs, chemicals, parts, toys, spas — everything you need in one place. No more calling five different companies for five different problems.

features.title: 35 Years of Local Trust
features.description: We've been right here in Berkley since 1991. Your neighbors trust us, your town knows us, and we stand behind every job with our name and reputation.

features.title: Owner-Involved, Every Job
features.description: Chris Lindberg isn't just the owner — he's on the phone, at the job site, and available when you need answers. Personal service is our standard, not an upgrade.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: From a bag of chlorine to a full pool installation, you'll always get honest pricing upfront. Stop by the shop or call for a quote — we keep it simple.

guarantee.headline: Our "Neighborhood Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any service, repair, or installation doesn't meet your expectations, call us and we'll make it right — no runaround, no fine print. We've built our reputation one backyard at a time over 35 years, and we're not about to risk it. Your satisfaction isn't just guaranteed — it's personal.

faqs.question: How soon can you start on my pool project?
faqs.answer: It depends on the season and scope, but most service calls are scheduled within a few days. New installations and liner replacements are typically booked within 1-2 weeks. Call us and we'll give you a realistic timeline right away.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't install?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Whether we built it or not, we service all inground and above-ground pools. Repairs, openings, closings, liner replacements — if it's a pool, we can help.

faqs.question: What brands do you carry in your retail store?
faqs.answer: We carry trusted names in pool chemicals, pumps, filters, heaters, and accessories. Stop by 32 South Main Street in Berkley to browse our full inventory or call ahead and we'll set aside what you need.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool winterization for New England weather?
faqs.answer: Yes — seasonal opening and closing is one of our core services. We've been winterizing pools through 35 Massachusetts winters, so your pool is protected against freezing, ice damage, and debris all off-season.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Berkley, Raynham, Taunton, Brockton, Bridgewater, Marshfield, Randolph, Halifax, East Taunton, and surrounding Southeastern Massachusetts communities. If you're nearby, give us a call — we likely cover your area.

testimonials.name: Long-Time Owner
testimonials.text: After 20 years as pool owners, Pool n Play has been the most pleasant experience. We recommend them to everyone we know.

testimonials.name: Emergency Client
testimonials.text: Chris responded right away and was extremely sensitive to our situation. Pool n Play saved our pool and even helped us with our insurance claim.

testimonials.name: Local Homeowner
testimonials.text: The staff was knowledgeable about our requests, had items in stock, offered fair pricing, and provided prompt responses. Great local pool company.

contact.subtitle: Call us, stop by the shop, or fill out the form below. With 35 years of experience and a full-service retail store, everything your pool needs is right here in Berkley.
